channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Тренд for 24 часа, 13–16 April 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
9 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Тренд for 24 часа, 13–16 April 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/bulgarian_ep_polls/2026-04-16-Тренд.html
